title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
subtitle: Until The Unexpected Party
quotes: In a hole in the ground there lived a hobbit...
There is nothing like looking, if you want to find something.
The world is not in your books and maps. It's out there.
There are no safe paths in this part of the world.
May the hair on your toes never fall out!
Where there's life there's hope, and need of vittles.
It does not do to leave a live dragon out of your calculations.
If more of us valued food and cheer and song above hoarded gold, it would be a merrier world.
The road goes ever on and on...
I think I'm quite ready for another adventure.
He charged the ranks of the goblins of Mount Gram in the Battle of the Green Fields, and knocked their king Golfibul's head clean off with a wooden club.
A box without hinges, key, or lid, yet golden treasure inside is hid.
Never laugh at live dragons, Bilbo you fool!
What has roots as nobody sees, is taller than trees...
Alive without breath, as cold as death; never thirsty, ever drinking, all in mail never clinking.
A distant light kindled in the east, and the darkness fled from the sky.
So comes snow after fire, and even dragons have their ending!
